expectations.evidence: Brief 3-line 'Context' section but no structured constraint analysis. Doesn't explicitly identify optimization priorities or trade-offs before recommending.
Recommends Next.js monolith with clear 'Why a Monolith, Not Microservices' section tied to team size.
Mentions microservices briefly as what NOT to do, but doesn't compare alternative architectural styles (serverless, modular monolith patterns, etc.) with trade-offs.
Full project structure, data model, and frontend architecture described. Good detail on component organization.
Auth mentioned as a tech choice (NextAuth/Clerk) but not as an architectural decision. No error handling strategy. Monitoring gets one bullet point. No config management discussion.
Detailed 3-month timeline with week-by-week breakdown and work division strategy. Very actionable.
